title: Positive Thinking!
overview: When Yumeko wakes up in a hospital, she learns that she's lost her memory and gained a brand new personality.

title: The Man from the Park and Vice President
overview: Yumeko must give her first presentation at work, but her idea notebooks go missing.

title: The Old Me
overview: As police investigate her accident, Yumeko begins suffering from unsettling flashbacks of her past.

title: Charm Point
overview: Yumeko and Maezono navigate a tricky a business trip, and Shigemori confronts his workplace crush.

title: No Such Thing as a Bad Kid
overview: Yumeko is thrilled by Keisuke's dinner invite, but a mysterious child dampens her excitement.

title: Yumeko and Her Mom's Relationship
overview: As Minami’s investigation deepens, Yumeko decides to revisit past relationships in search of answers.

title: The Only One in the World
overview: Yumeko meets the package designer for her product and learns more about Keisuke and Maezono's past.

title: Kindness Comes with a Cold
overview: Yumeko rushes to complete tasks at work, and just when she makes plans to meet Keisuke, she catches a cold.

title: The Person He Loves?
overview: Yumeko decides on a thank you gift for Yuki, only to witness him entering a hotel with Rikako.

title: Minami Wants to Die
overview: Detective Minami takes a rare day off from work, and Yumeko and Tanigawa learn of his past.

title: The Grill-Out of Joy and Suspense
overview: Yumeko's Ramune Chips turns out to be a hit, and Yuki plans a grill-out to celebrate her team's success.

title: Your Smile Is My Happiness
overview: As Degawa urges Yumeko to confront Rikako, the two run into Maezono. Meanwhile, Yuki and Rikako return home.
